failure_modes.cause: BPR set below required pressure leading to insufficient back pressure
failure_modes.mitigation: Adjust BPR setting to 11.0 bar to match system requirements

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T=120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.mode: Flow restriction due to solvent viscosity
failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG solvent at operating temperature
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure pump is rated for high viscosity fluids and monitor flow rate

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=8.04248 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve at 11.0 bar setting with solvent to ensure proper back pressure maintenance
Measure flow rate and pressure drop with TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C to confirm system performance
